---
agent: 'agent'
description: 'create github instruction'
---

Please generate a project-specific GitHub instruction based on existing copilot-instructions.md to create instruction specifically for the project into `.github/instructions/{name}.instructions.md.` The instruction should be based on the copilot instruction but should be more specific to the project and should include examples from the project. The instruction should be clear and concise and should be easy to understand for developers who are new to the project. The instruction should also include best practices for coding and performance optimization.
